title: Apply clear over base multi-layer and pearl refinishing materials to vehicle body components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply clear over base multi-layer and pearl refinishing materials to vehicle body components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures

elements.title: Mix COB multi-layer and pearl refinishing materials

pcs.text: Calculate and mix refinishing materials according to workplace procedures, and paint manufacturer specifications, formulas and codes2.2 Record codes and information relevant to job requirements 2.3 Carry out mixing activities according to workplace procedures

elements.title: Apply COB multi-layer and pearl refinishing materials

pcs.text: Apply refinishing materials using manufacturer recommended method and intervals according to workplace procedures3.2 Dry refinishing materials and equipment according to workplace procedures3.3 Apply refinishing techniques to ensure painted surface meets job requirements3.4 Rectify paint surface faults using compounds, polishes and glazes to blend rectified areas with existing paintwork according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply refinishing materials using manufacturer recommended method and intervals according to workplace procedures3.2 Dry refinishing materials and equipment according to workplace procedures3.3 Apply refinishing techniques to ensure painted surface meets job requirements3.4 Rectify paint surface faults using compounds, polishes and glazes to blend rectified areas with existing paintwork according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply refinishing materials using manufacturer recommended method and intervals according to workplace procedures3.2 Dry refinishing materials and equipment according to workplace procedures3.3 Apply refinishing techniques to ensure painted surface meets job requirements3.4 Rectify paint surface faults using compounds, polishes and glazes to blend rectified areas with existing paintwork according to workplace procedures.

elements.title: Complete work processes
